user_message: Why is ACR dropping on Datum Corp? It's been sliding for 3 months and I'm pretty sure it's because they cancelled their EA and moved to pay-as-you-go. Can you confirm and give me the recovery plan?

content.recent_activity: Last login: 2024-03-08; Support ticket opened 2024-02-20 re: cost optimization

signals.detail: EA cancelled Dec 2023, moved to PAYG

usability_anchors: Score 5: Given the CSA has correctly identified the root cause (EA cancellation -> PAYG -> cost sensitivity -> VM decommissions), the orchestrator confirms with evidence rather than forcing ranked-hypothesis ceremony; presents single clear root cause with supporting evidence chain, then moves directly to recovery actions
Score 3: Produces ranked hypotheses as required by contract but the top hypothesis is correctly identified as EA cancellation; doesn't acknowledge that the CSA already knows the answer

Score 1: Produces 3-5 ranked hypotheses giving equal weight to alternative explanations when the data clearly shows a single root cause (FM-WF06-K violation would be scored lower in assumption-stress mode)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Evidence chain: EA cancelled Dec 15 -> PAYG transition -> cost sensitivity -> support ticket (cost optimization) -> 12 VMs deleted Jan -> ongoing decline; workload decomposition shows compute/networking hit hardest (VM-heavy workloads)
Score 3: Identifies EA cancellation and VM deletion but doesn't connect the causal chain fully
Score 1: Lists data points without causal linkage or invents alternative explanations
decision_anchors: Score 5: Recovery actions focus on re-establishing cost predictability (MACC discussion, Reserved Instance optimization, right-sizing guidance) and handoffs to funding-partner-activation for contract re-engagement; timeline is realistic
Score 3: Recovery actions are correct but generic ('discuss cost optimization with customer')
Score 1: Proposes recovery actions unrelated to the root cause (e.g., 'increase feature adoption' when the issue is billing)

guardrail_checks: This is an assumption-stress scenario testing FM-WF06-K: requiring ranked hypotheses when single root cause is clear
Guardrail axis scored neutrally per assumption-stress scoring mode
Must still present evidence accurately even when questioning the hypothesis-ranking requirement
